name: Charter Hall Retail Reit
analysis: CQR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.0000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.0400, stop A$3.7521, target A$4.9037 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
